mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO business_status ( status_id, business_date, is_open, next_call_number, daily_total_customers, daily_revenue, daily_takeout_count )
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT MAX(status_id) FROM business_status), 0) + 1, #{date}, true, 1, 0, 0.00, 0
FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM business_status WHERE business_date = #{date} )
mapper.update:
INSERT INTO business_status ( business_date, is_open, next_call_number, daily_total_customers ) VALUES ( #{date}, #{isOpen}, #{nextCallNumber}, 0 )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_open = VALUES(is_open), next_call_number = VALUES(next_call_number)
mapper.select: SELECT bs.business_date AS date, bs.daily_revenue AS revenue, bs.daily_total_customers AS customers, bs.daily_takeout_count AS takeoutOrderCount FROM business_status bs WHERE bs.business_date = #{date}

SELECT bs.business_date AS date, bs.daily_revenue AS revenue, bs.daily_total_customers AS customers, bs.daily_takeout_count AS takeoutOrderCount FROM business_status bs WHERE bs.business_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY bs.business_date

SELECT record_id AS "记录ID", reservation_id AS "预约号", customer_name AS "客户姓名", customer_phone AS "客户电话",
DATE_FORMAT(reservation_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS "原定预约时间", forfeited_amount AS "没收金额", DATE_FORMAT(cancellation_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS "取消时间", cancellation_reason AS "取消原因" FROM forfeited_deposits WHERE DATE(cancellation_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY cancellation_time ASC
